{{Quote|I am Lak Jit, Councilor. A simple seeker of knowledge and truth.|Lak Jit to [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]|<ref name="Specter of the Past" />}}
'''Lak Jit''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] [[Information broker/Legends|information broker]], who worked indirectly for [[Talon Karrde]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|This alien was discovered near Mount Tantiss by one of the cleansing teams. He had been digging through the soil in the fault line area and had found six datacards.|[[Cakhmaim]] to [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]|<ref name="Specter of the Past" />}}
In [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], he unearthed several old [[Datacard/Legends|datacards]] while excavating the [[Mount Tantiss/Legends|Mount Tantiss]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]]. It was revealed later that he had found a copy of the [[Caamas Document]]. Leia managed to catch him with the assistance of [[Talon Karrde]]. She recovered the document but this didn't prevent the [[Caamas Document Crisis]].<ref name="Specter of the Past" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
